{{Quote|Let there be truth between your heart and the Force. All else is transitory.|Surenit Kli'qiy|<ref name="Power of the Jedi Sourcebook">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref>}}
'''Surenit Kli'qiy''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] who served [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].
